title: ICRISAT CRP 2 Activity Women’s Empowerment in Rural South Asia: Micro-level Evidences on Labor Participation, Institutions and Food Security
abstract:
The ICRISAT Village Level Studies (VLS) offer a unique
opportunity to look at changes in villages over time. This activity
offers a valuable and unique opportunity to examine the gender
implications of changes in production systems. The existing
panel data for 6 villages in the Semi-Arid Tropics (SAT) of India
from 1975-84 and 2001 onwards captures and documents the
changes in the farming systems and rural households
